text.title: TDD Workflow Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: Run a spike first; write tests after the spec stabilises.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND behavior_known == true AND visual_feedback_drives == true

conclusion.verdict: Defer TDD; use screenshots + manual review while the layout settles.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND behavior_known == true AND visual_feedback_drives == false AND performance_dominant == true
drivers.valid == true AND behavior_known == true AND visual_feedback_drives == false AND performance_dominant == false

conclusion.verdict: Run strict TDD with PostToolUse hook + per-behavior loop.
